d:
When a battle starts, if there is an ally placed 1 tile behind Gunnar, he summons a Doomfield at that ally's location, increasing their normal attack range by [[3]] and ATK by [[25%]] of Gunnar's initial ATK. He and the ally remain [[steadfast]] until Gunnar is defeated, or until [[3]]s after the ally leaves the Doomfield. During battle, Gunnar locks onto and prioritizes attacking the enemy targeted by the ally standing on his Doomfield.
Active. Gunnar deals [[320%]]<ATK> damage 2 times to all enemies within 2 tiles of the target tile, then launches a Doomsday Meteor that deals [[470%]]<ATK> damage to all enemies within range and sets the ground on fire for [[15]]s. Enemies standing in the fire take [[80%]]<ATK> damage every second and lose [[40]] Vitality. When cast automatically, Gunnar prioritizes targeting the enemy area that allows him to hit the most enemies.
Increases Doomsday Meteor's damage dealt to all enemies within range to [[490%]]<ATK>.
Increases Doomsday Meteor's damage dealt to all enemies within range to [[510%]]<ATK>.
Increases Doomsday Meteor's damage dealt to all enemies within range to [[530%]]<ATK>.
Increases Doomsday Meteor's damage dealt to all enemies within range to [[550%]]<ATK>.

Gunnar fires his cannons 6 times, each time dealing [[65%]]<ATK> damage to all enemies adjacent to his locked-on target. If there is a Doomfield active, the ally within the Doomfield will also launch 6 coordinated attacks, dealing damage to the locked-on target equal to [[6%]] their max HP and stunning them for [[0.5]]s. This damage cannot exceed Gunnar's [[100%]]<ATK>.
Each cannon strike deals [[70%]]<ATK> damage to all enemies adjacent to Gunnar's locked-on target.
Each cannon strike deals [[75%]]<ATK> damage to all enemies adjacent to Gunnar's locked-on target.
Each cannon strike deals [[80%]]<ATK> damage to all enemies adjacent to Gunnar's locked-on target.

Gunnar lets out a roar, granting himself a shield that absorbs [[450%]]<ATK> damage. He also grants a shield that absorbs [[400%]]<ATK> damage for [[6]]s to every ally [[behind]] him.
If there is a Doomfield active, the Doomfield gets strengthened, increasing the ATK SPD of the ally within it by [[40]] for [[8]]s.
Increases the value of the shield Gunnar gives himself to [[500%]]<ATK>.
Increases the value of the shield Gunnar gives himself to [[550%]]<ATK>.
Increases the value of the shield Gunnar gives himself to [[600%]]<ATK>.
Increases Ranged DEF and Vitality by [[10]]. For each allied hero standing [[behind]] this hero, increases Ranged DEF and Vitality by an extra [[7]].
Increases Ranged DEF and Vitality by [[12]]. For each allied hero standing [[behind]] this hero, increases Ranged DEF and Vitality by an extra [[8]].
Increases Ranged DEF and Vitality by [[15]]. For each allied hero standing [[behind]] this hero, increases Ranged DEF and Vitality by an extra [[9]].

Whenever the ally within Gunnar's Doomfield deals total damage equal to [[1400%]] of Gunnar's initial ATK, Gunnar automatically launches a missile at his locked-on target, dealing [[500%]]<ATK> damage and recovering HP equal to [[100%]] of the damage dealt.
Increases the missile damage to [[550%]]<ATK>.
Increases the missile damage to [[600%]]<ATK>.
After Gunnar's HP ratio remains above [[35%]] for [[3]]s, the ally within his Doomfield becomes [[invincible]] and gains extra ATK equal to [[45%]] of Gunnar's initial ATK.

r.d: In Rivalry Mode, when HP drops below [[60%]], reduces damage taken by [[15%]] and recovers [[3%]] of lost HP per second for [[8]]s. Triggers up to once every [[20]]s.
Lvl. 4 Refinement: In Rivalry Mode, increases 28 Crit Resist, 20 Crit DMG DEF.

d: If an area set on fire is struck again by Doomsday Meteor, the area becomes permanently scorched. The fire no longer expires, and enemies within the scorched area cannot heal or gain shields.
